ultros_development_suggestion: Ultros is still under constant development. If you have suggestions or feedback, feel free to leave suggestions in the discord.
made_using_universalis: Made using universalis' API. Please contribute to Universalis to help this site stay up to date.

meta_title: Ultros · FFXIV Market Board Analytics & Retainer Tracker
meta_description: Live Final Fantasy XIV market board analytics: cross-world flip finder, recipe profit calculator, retainer undercut alerts, Discord bot, and shopping lists — free for every data center.
ultros_tagline: market board analytics for final fantasy xiv
ultros_description: buy low, sell high, and track your retainers with a fast, modern ui.
item_explorer_desc: Explore all the items on the market board
flip_finder_desc: Earn gil by buying low, selling high
vendor_resale_desc: Buy from vendors, sell on market
lists_desc: Create lists & buy the cheapest items
discord_bot_desc: Get alerts when your retainer is undercut
unable_to_load_recent_sales: Unable to load recent sales. Please try refreshing.
load_extended_history_help: Fetch up to 5000 past sales — slower, but a much longer view.
no_sales_found: No sales found for the selected filters. Try expanding the time range or disabling HQ-only.
no_active_listings_found: No active listings found for this world. Try checking other worlds or come back later.
create_new_list_to_get_started: Create a new list to get started!
category_list_desc: List of items for the item category %category%
about_ultros_desc: About Ultros - FFXIV Market Board Analysis Tool
about_ultros_text: Ultros is a Final Fantasy XIV market board analysis tool that utilizes data sourced from Universalis. Our goal is to help you make better decisions on the market board, whether you are a crafter, gatherer, or flipper.
technology_text: Ultros is built with Rust for high performance and reliability. The project is open source and we welcome contributions.
credits_universalis_1: This project would not be possible without
credits_universalis_2: , which provides the market board data. Please consider contributing to Universalis to help this site stay up to date.
claim_error: Error adding character to your profile:
home_world_desc: The home world will default for Flip Finder and several other pages
welcome_page_desc: Get set up with Ultros by picking your home world. Takes about ten seconds.
welcome_subtitle: Let's get you set up. It only takes a moment.
welcome_why_home_world_title: Why we need your home world
welcome_why_home_world_body: Ultros uses your home world to find the cheapest listings, surface profitable flips, and show prices for items you care about. We store it locally in a cookie — no account required.
welcome_step_home_world_help: This is the world your characters live on. You can change it anytime from the settings page.
welcome_step_price_zone_help: When you browse items, this is the world, datacenter, or region we'll show prices for. Most people leave this on their datacenter for the widest market view.
welcome_step_language_help: Pick your preferred language. You can switch anytime from the top nav.
welcome_home_world_set_with_name: Home world set to {{world}}. You're good to go.
welcome_pick_world_to_continue: Pick a home world above to continue
home_onboarding_banner_body: Set your home world to unlock personalized flip deals, market movers, and price comparisons.
default_price_zone_desc_1: What world/region to show prices by default for within
ad_settings_desc_1: If you do not wish to see ads, this toggle will remove them entirely from the site. Use of adblockers is fine as well. If you wish to support the site, do consider leaving this disabled.
ad_settings_desc_2: This is mostly an experiment for the time being.
delete_account_desc: DANGER: If you wish to delete your account and all information associated with it, confirm with the toggle and then press the delete button
settings_page_desc: Manage settings such as homeworld or other for Ultros
language_desc: Select your preferred language for the interface.
no_characters_added: No characters added yet. Add a character to get started.
set_minimum_roi_percent: Set the minimum return on investment %
please_configure_crafter_levels: Please configure your crafter levels above to see profitable recipes.

filter_by_predicted_time_to_next_sale: Filter by predicted time to next sale (e.g., 1w 30m)
include_5_percent_market_tax: Include 5% market tax in profit calculations
failed_to_load_analyzer: Failed to load analyzer - try again in 30 seconds

track_market_trends: Track market trends and identify profitable opportunities

trading_tips_3: Consider transportation costs when calculating profits
trading_tips_4: Start with smaller investments until you understand the market
venture_analyzer_filter_outliers_tooltip: If enabled, sales outliers will be removed from the average price calculation using the Interquartile Range (IQR) method.
leve_analyzer_filter_outliers_tooltip: If enabled, sales outliers will be removed from the average price calculation using the Interquartile Range (IQR) method.

analyzer_minimum_profit_desc: Set the minimum profit margin you want to see
analyzer_profit_per_day_desc: Set the minimum profit per day (Profit / Sale Duration)
analyzer_minimum_sales_desc: Filter by minimum number of recent sales
analyzer_minimum_roi_desc: Set the minimum return on investment percentage
analyzer_minimum_buy_price_desc: Hide rows where the buy-price is below this floor — filters out price-war and sniper listings
analyzer_last_sold_within_desc: Hide rows whose most recent sale is older than this (e.g. 7d, 1d 12h)
analyzer_sale_time_prediction_desc: Filter by predicted time to next sale (e.g., 1w 30m)
analyzer_tax_calculation_desc: Include 5% market tax in profit calculations
analyzer_meta_desc: The analyzer enables FFXIV merchants to find the best items to buy on other worlds and sell on %world%. Filter for the best profits or return, make gil through market arbitrage.
analyzer_failed_to_load: Failed to load analyzer - try again in 30 seconds
analyzer_index_meta_desc: Find items on the Final Fantasy 14 marketboard that are great for resale. Used to earn gil quickly.
analyzer_index_desc_1: The analyzer helps find items on the Final Fantasy 14 marketboard that are cheaper on other worlds that sell for more on your world, enabling you to earn gil through market arbitrage.
analyzer_index_desc_2: Adjust parameters to find items that sell well and maximize your profits.
analyzer_index_choose_world: Choose a world to get started:
analyzer_feature_profit_tracking_desc: Monitor profit margins and ROI across different worlds
analyzer_feature_market_analysis_desc: Track market trends and identify profitable opportunities
analyzer_feature_custom_filters_desc: Set custom parameters to find your perfect trades
analyzer_tip_1: Use the ROI filter to find items with the best return on investment
analyzer_tip_2: Check the sale frequency to ensure items will sell in a reasonable time
analyzer_tip_3: Consider transportation costs when calculating profits
analyzer_tip_4: Start with smaller investments until you understand the market

vendor_resale_minimum_sales_desc: Filter by minimum number of recent sales
vendor_resale_minimum_roi_desc: Set the minimum return on investment percentage
vendor_resale_sale_time_prediction_desc: Filter by predicted time to next sale (e.g., 1w 30m)
vendor_resale_tax_calculation_desc: Include 5% market tax in profit calculations
vendor_resale_meta_desc: Find items sold by vendors that can be resold on the %world% marketboard for a profit.
vendor_resale_meta_desc_default: Find items sold by vendors that can be resold on the marketboard for a profit.
vendor_resale_tool_desc: This tool helps you find items that are sold by NPCs (vendors) for less than they are currently selling for on the market board. Buy low from vendors, sell high to players!
vendor_resale_tool_select_world: Select your world below to see profitable vendor resale opportunities.
vendor_resale_choose_world: Choose a world to get started:
vendor_resale_arbitrage_desc: Profit from price differences between NPC vendors and the market board.
vendor_resale_vendor_data_desc: Automatically identifies items sold by vendors.
vendor_resale_filters_desc: Filter by profit, ROI, and sales velocity to find safe bets.
currency_exchange_meta_desc: All items that can be exchanged for %item% with how much you stand to earn
currency_exchange_how_many: How many of this currency do you have?
currency_exchange_price_per_item_desc: Filter items based on price per unit
currency_exchange_qty_received_desc: Filter by amount of items received
currency_exchange_home_world_not_set_pre: Home world is not set, go to the
currency_exchange_home_world_not_set_suf: page and set your home world to see prices on this page
currency_exchange_assuming_sales_on: Assuming sales on your home world: {{world}}
currency_exchange_error_loading: Error loading, try again in 30 seconds!
currency_exchange_hero_desc: Discover lucrative opportunities in Final Fantasy 14 with our Currency Exchange tool. Easily locate items purchasable with in-game currencies, such as Allied Seals or Wolf Marks, that can be resold for significant profits on the marketboard. Whether you're a seasoned trader or just starting out, maximize your earnings by identifying high-value items and optimizing your currency investments.
currency_exchange_meta_desc_default: Find valuable items bought with in-game currency, sell for gil. Maximize earnings effortlessly.
currency_exchange_no_currencies_found: No currencies found matching your search.
chart_no_sales_in_window: No sales in this window. Try a wider range.

retainers_search_placeholder: Search for a retainer to add
retainers_data_notice: Please keep in mind that data may not always be up to date. To update data, please contribute to universalis and then refresh this page.
retainers_undercuts_description: This page will only show listings that have been undercut, enabling you to quickly view which items need to be refreshed
retainers_base_path_description: Retainers can be added added to your account while logged in and tracked. To get started get logged in and click the tabs above.
retainers_claim_prompt_start: To claim this retainer, please login and visit

item_explorer_default_desc: Lookup items by their category. Similar to the market board categories that are visible in Final Fantasy 14. Find the cheapest minions, or find that new piece of glamour for your Summoner.
item_explorer_default_instruction: Choose a category from the menu to explore items.
item_explorer_default_sort_info: Once you choose a category, you will be able to sort the items by price, date added, alphabetically, or by item level.
scrip_sources_meta_desc: Analyze Collectable Scrip Sources for efficiency
scrip_sources_description: This tool finds the most efficient Collectables to craft for White/Purple Scrips based on current market board prices for materials.

theme_persistence_note: theme is saved to your browser and applied instantly. no reloads, no drama.

add_recipe_start_typing: Start typing to search for a recipe...
alert_drawer_err_threshold_int: Price threshold must be a positive integer
alert_drawer_webhook_hint: Get a webhook URL from a channel's Integrations settings in Discord.
crafter_levels_help: Set your crafter levels to filter recipes in the Recipe Analyzer.
make_place_instructions: Copy+Paste a list with a bunch of items in it formatted as Item1: Quantity. Make place users can paste their furniture+dye lists here.
analyzer_maximum_budget_desc: Set the maximum purchase price per item
recipe_analyzer_subcrafts_tooltip: If enabled, the analyzer will check if it's cheaper to craft intermediate ingredients rather than buying them from the market board.
recipe_analyzer_require_hq_tooltip: If enabled, ingredient costs will prefer HQ listings when available. Falls back to LQ if no HQ listing exists.
trends_meta_desc: View market trends for Final Fantasy 14 items, including high velocity, rising prices, and falling prices.
trends_subtitle_prefix: Analyze item price movements and sales velocity for

open_garlandtools_aria_label: Open Garlandtools item page in a new tab

job_set_detail_materials_desc: Aggregate ingredients across every craftable piece in this set.
job_set_detail_add_set_tooltip: Add every piece in this set to one of your lists
job_set_detail_add_materials_tooltip: Add the aggregated crafting materials for this set to a list

history_empty: No items in your viewing history yet.
history_empty_hint: Items you view will appear here.
not_found_body: The page you are looking for has been cast into the void, or perhaps never existed at all.
cookie_policy_intro: This is the Cookie Policy for Ultros, accessible from
cookie_policy_what_are_cookies_body: As is common practice with almost all professional websites this site uses cookies, which are tiny files that are downloaded to your computer, to improve your experience. This page describes what information they gather, how we use it and why we sometimes need to store these cookies. We will also share how you can prevent these cookies from being stored however this may downgrade or 'break' certain elements of the sites functionality.
cookie_policy_how_we_use_body: We use cookies for a variety of reasons detailed below. Unfortunately in most cases there are no industry standard options for disabling cookies without completely disabling the functionality and features they add to this site. It is recommended that you leave on all cookies if you are not sure whether you need them or not in case they are used to provide a service that you use.
cookie_policy_disabling_body: You can prevent the setting of cookies by adjusting the settings on your browser (see your browser Help for how to do this). Be aware that disabling cookies will affect the functionality of this and many other websites that you visit. Disabling cookies will usually result in also disabling certain functionality and features of the this site. Therefore it is recommended that you do not disable cookies. This Cookies Policy was created with the help of the
cookie_policy_account_cookies_body: If you create an account with us then we will use cookies for the management of the signup process and general administration. These cookies will usually be deleted when you log out however in some cases they may remain afterwards to remember your site preferences when logged out.
cookie_policy_login_cookies_body: We use cookies when you are logged in so that we can remember this fact. This prevents you from having to log in every single time you visit a new page. These cookies are typically removed or cleared when you log out to ensure that you can only access restricted features and areas when logged in.
cookie_policy_third_party_body: In some special cases we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties. The following section details which third party cookies you might encounter through this site.
cookie_policy_adsense_body: The Google AdSense service we use to serve advertising uses a DoubleClick cookie to serve more relevant ads across the web and limit the number of times that a given ad is shown to you.
cookie_policy_adsense_faq: For more information on Google AdSense see the official Google AdSense privacy FAQ.
cookie_policy_more_info_body: Hopefully that has clarified things for you and as was previously mentioned if there is something that you aren't sure whether you need or not it's usually safer to leave cookies enabled in case it does interact with one of the features you use on our site.
cookie_policy_more_info_link_intro: For more general information on cookies, please read
cookie_policy_contact_intro: However if you are still looking for more information then you can contact us through one of our preferred contact methods:
no_owned_lists_but_shared: You don't own any lists yet — but others have shared {{count}} with you.
leave_list_tooltip: Remove yourself from this shared list
recipe_analyzer_tool_summary: Find recipes where estimated craft cost is lower than the market price for the finished item.
recipe_analyzer_tool_context: Configure crafter levels first so the results match recipes you can actually make.
recipe_analyzer_tool_help: Recipe Analyzer uses cheapest ingredient listings, optional subcraft checks, your crafter levels, and recent sales. A profitable recipe is strongest when the output also sells regularly.
list_view_subscribe_tooltip: Subscribe to price alerts on every priced item in this list
list_subscribe_description: You'll be notified when any item in this list drops to or below its target price. Set per-item targets from the list page.
list_update_subscribe_description: You'll be notified when this list or one of its rows changes.
endpoints_enable_browser_push_title: Subscribe this browser to receive push notifications when your alerts fire
endpoints_empty_state: No endpoints yet. Add one to receive alerts.
endpoints_no_discord_servers: No shared Discord servers where you can manage the server and the bot can write to a channel.
undercut_alert_description: Get notified when another listing undercuts one of your claimed retainers.
confidence_band_high_help: Strong sample size, diverse buyers, very little launder noise — recommendations are trustworthy.
confidence_band_medium_help: Usable but treat as approximate — flagged in UI.
confidence_band_low_help: Thin market or noisy history — use as a rough hint only.
confidence_band_unusable_help: Half or more of recent sales look like currency-transfer launder — recommendation suppressed.
market_pulse_load_failed: Couldn't load market pulse — retry shortly
market_movers_subtitle: Top items in the last 24 hours
market_movers_tab_rising_help: Items whose price climbed the most in the last 24 hours.
market_movers_tab_falling_help: Items whose price dropped the most in the last 24 hours.
market_movers_tab_units_help: Items with the most units traded in the last 24 hours (count, not gil).
market_movers_tab_gil_help: Items with the most gil changing hands in the last 24 hours (price × quantity).
market_movers_no_data: No trades yet in this window.
market_heat_no_data: No category activity in the last 24 hours.
top_opportunities_empty: No qualifying flips on this world right now.
trends_show_suspicious_help: Reveal items flagged as gil-trader laundering — they're hidden by default.
trends_empty_filtered: No items match these filters. Try widening the window, lowering Min sales, or enabling Show suspicious.
analyzer_show_suspicious_help: Reveal items hidden by the gil-trader laundering filter.
analyzer_empty_all_filtered: No safe deals match. Try Show suspicious or relax a filter.
scrip_sources_summary: Find collectables with the lowest estimated gil cost per scrip.
scrip_sources_context: The default sort optimizes efficiency: lower cost per scrip is better.
scrip_sources_help_body: Scrip Sources assumes high collectability rewards and calculates ingredient cost from market listings. Use scrip type and job filters to narrow to what you can actually turn in.
scrip_sources_efficiency_formula: cost per scrip = ingredient cost / high collectability scrip reward
scrip_sources_efficiency_details: The high reward is used as the max collectability target. Gathering and non-craftable sources are intentionally limited in this pass.
scrip_sources_assumption_lower_better: Lower cost per scrip is better
tooltip_exclude_shards: If enabled, crystal/shard/cluster ingredient costs are not counted toward the craft cost. Most crafters keep a stockpile.
tooltip_use_on_hand: Deduct ingredients you already own from the craft cost. Set per-ingredient totals on the item page.
analyzer_tooltip_sales_min: Each item only ships its 6 most recent sales. Set 1–6 to require that many of those sales were observed.
analyzer_tool_summary: Find likely buy-low/sell-high opportunities by comparing cheap listings against recent sale prices.
analyzer_tool_context: Use the filters below to trade off profit, ROI, purchase budget, and how quickly an item tends to sell.
analyzer_tool_help: Flip Finder combines recent sales, cheapest listings, tax settings, and optional cross-region checks. Treat the table as a shortlist: high profit is strongest when sales count and sale pace are also healthy.
analyzer_calc_formula: profit = estimated sale price - buy price - market tax
analyzer_calc_details: Estimated sale price uses recent sales and the selected world context. Cross-region mode can include cheaper buy worlds outside your current region.
analyzer_assumption_cross_region: Cross-region and outlier settings are shown above
analyzer_assumption_hq_nq: HQ and NQ are compared separately
recipe_analyzer_empty_set_levels_title: Set crafter levels to see recipe recommendations
recipe_analyzer_calc_formula: profit = output market price - ingredient cost
recipe_analyzer_calc_details: Ingredient cost uses the cheapest matching listings. Subcraft mode checks whether crafting intermediate ingredients is cheaper than buying them directly.
leve_analyzer_tool_summary: Estimate levequest value by comparing turn-in item cost against gil and expected item rewards.
leve_analyzer_tool_context: Reward item value is an estimate. Use it as a leveling shortlist, then confirm item supply before buying in bulk.
leve_analyzer_tool_help: Leve Analyzer mixes guaranteed gil rewards with expected market value from reward items. The first pass assumes baseline NQ turn-ins.
leve_analyzer_calc_formula: profit = gil reward + expected reward item value - turn-in cost
leve_analyzer_calc_details: Expected reward value depends on market prices and reward probabilities, so it is not the same as guaranteed gil.
venture_analyzer_tool_summary: Rank normal retainer ventures by gross market value and recent sales activity.
venture_analyzer_tool_context: Profit is gross revenue in this first pass; venture token cost and opportunity cost are not modeled.
venture_analyzer_tool_help: Venture Analyzer multiplies venture output quantity by current market price, then uses recent sales to help separate practical choices from slow-moving rare drops.
venture_analyzer_calc_formula: profit = output quantity * current market price
venture_analyzer_calc_details: This does not subtract venture token value or the opportunity cost of sending a retainer on another task.
vendor_resale_tool_summary_v2: Find NPC vendor items that may be worth buying as NQ items and reselling on the selected world.
vendor_resale_tool_context: HQ market listings are excluded because vendor purchases are normal quality. Specific NPC source names are not available yet.
vendor_resale_tool_help: Vendor Resale is useful for low-risk market checks where the buy price is fixed. Favor results with recent sales; high ROI on an item that rarely sells is still slow gil.
vendor_resale_calc_formula: profit = market price - vendor price - market tax
vendor_resale_calc_details: Vendor items are treated as NQ. The table compares fixed NPC cost against current market-board listings and recent sale speed.
vendor_resale_assumption_no_vendor_names: Vendor source names not shown yet
fc_crafting_tool_summary: Estimate Free Company workshop project profit from material costs and recent output sales.
fc_crafting_tool_context: Workshop outputs can have sparse sales, so pair profit with velocity before committing expensive materials.
fc_crafting_tool_help: FC Crafting Analyzer totals company craft materials at current market prices, compares that against the output item, and flags how much recent sales data supports the recommendation.
fc_crafting_calc_formula: profit = output market price - total material cost
fc_crafting_calc_details: Total cost is derived from company craft supply items, required sets, and current market-board listings for each material.
fc_crafting_assumption_market_prices: Material prices come from market listings
trends_tool_summary: Review high-velocity, rising-price, and falling-price items for the selected world.
trends_tool_context: Trends are directional signals. Open an item page before treating a movement as a buying decision.
trends_tool_help: Market Trends groups items by recent sales and price movement. High velocity is best for demand checks; rising and falling prices are prompts to investigate item history.
trends_explanation_high_velocity: Items selling frequently enough to be useful for demand and restock decisions.
trends_explanation_rising: Items whose recent price movement points upward. Treat this as a prompt to inspect supply, not a guarantee.
trends_explanation_falling: Items whose recent price movement points downward, often from oversupply or cooling demand.
bot_meta_desc: Command reference and setup guide for the Ultros Discord bot — FFXIV market data in your server.
bot_tagline: Look up market prices, manage retainers, and get undercut alerts — all from Discord.
bot_invite_prefix: Adds the Ultros bot to your server with the
bot_invite_suffix: permission. You can configure per-channel access from Discord's server settings.
bot_setup_step_verify: Verify your FFXIV character on this site (Settings → Characters → Lodestone challenge).
bot_setup_step_discord_run_suffix: — the autocomplete only shows retainers belonging to your verified characters.
bot_setup_step_run_in_channel_prefix: In any channel where the bot is installed, run
bot_setup_step_run_in_channel_suffix: — you'll get a ping the moment a competitor undercuts you.
bot_cmd_retainer_description: Manage your retainers. Requires a verified character.
bot_cmd_retainer_list_desc: Show your retainers and their listing counts.
bot_cmd_retainer_add_desc: Claim a retainer (autocomplete only shows your own).
bot_cmd_retainer_check_undercuts_desc: Only your listings that have been undercut.
bot_cmd_list_description: Shopping lists scoped to a region/datacenter/world.
bot_cmd_list_show_list_desc: Show current lowest prices for the list.
bot_cmd_character_description: Lodestone lookup. To verify ownership, use Settings on this site.
help_meta_desc: Task-focused help for Ultros market, crafting, retainer, and currency tools.
help_index_intro: Short, task-focused guides for understanding what each Ultros tool optimizes for, what data it uses, and what to do next.
lists_share_search_placeholder: Search Discord ID or Group name...
lists_accept_invite_body: Sign in with Discord to add this shared list to your account.
related_items_aria_open_recipe: Open this recipe in the analyzer
alerts_meta_desc: Manage your Ultros alert endpoints, undercut rules, and delivery history. Get notified the moment your FFXIV retainer is undercut.
lists_meta_desc: Build FFXIV shopping lists with the cheapest prices across your data center. Share lists with your free company and auto-track acquired items.
list_view_meta_desc: Track item acquisition, find the cheapest world for every item, and share progress with your free company on Ultros.
groups_meta_desc: Manage your Ultros groups to share shopping lists with your free company or friends.
groups_no_groups_found: No groups found. Create one to start sharing lists!
